What’s with the ethereal core announcement
Just started playing like a few weeks ago. Does it mean they won’t be able to get limited awakeners after some time?
you know what ethereal cores do yes?
essentially they act like limited pulls (luminous) until the end of a version when they revert to regular pulls (pure core)

Nah, it just means that if they run any new special events (anni special event, other, etc) those rewards will be ethereal cores (time limited cores that turn into pure cores after patch), but everything else will stay the same
and they announced they'll be swapping to them in the event shop, which created a backlash

well.... anyone really i assume you are new, so just toss Karen or Doll
Personally i am running Faint/Caecus/Thais/Goliath, but goliath is a flexible DPS that pairs well into many teams
Def recommend Caecus as a duo for an early/first team as you would get dupes for both pulling on the same pure core banner

Other than that run whatever you like, you can go deeper into counter making use of caecus, you could tulu/myriam/goliath/caecus, you could run something entirely unrelated, there are many ways to build viable teams

The reason im usong faint and thais is easy access to str buffs, eventually resulting in several hundred k dmg goliath turns, and 800% death resistance, with things like using thais exalt to dupe faint str buff/debuff

basically as long as you have a plan and you know why it will work, and if you don't have a plan yet you are worrying about this too early, just go Goliath/Caecus/whatever you like or pulled

You will need to invest in many teams for the end game so even if you swap it will not be a waste just the start of team 2

How important is the tier list? I dont see many ppl mentioning it

Just use all your pure cores (grey) on standard blue realm as said above, and you'll get Caecus/Goliath/Celeste/Faros/Sanga randomly, they are all good, keep pulling until you're satisfied - i went with 7 copies of goliath (over exalt unlock) and 3 copies of Caecus for the above comp (still missing one). Meanwhile think about your next team, for example a Faros poison team since you are going to have multiple copies of her

Tier list is irrelevant unless you chase leaderboards or Alert V endgame, there are only a few units i would not recommend to use such as Uvash or Helot (og) because they have been powercrept but pretty much anything works if you take the time to think about what you are doing and why
